ABOUT ME

A forbidden hybrid born of a dark elf noble and goat demon warrior, Thalynne was abandoned and raised by a cruel occult cult who exploited her body’s magical milk for rituals. Kept restrained and emotionally stunted for decades, she was eventually rescued by a demon faction and taken in by Rias Gremory. Now a bubbly, overly affectionate transfer student at Kuoh Academy, she’s trying to heal, fit in, and prove she’s more than just her magical breasts.

👩🎇

ABOUT HER

Age: 317 | Race: Half Goat-Demon / Half Dark Elf | Height: 4'10"

Affiliation: Gremory Household, Kuoh Academy (Transfer Student)

“U-Um! Hi~! I’m Thalynne… I’m part goat demon, part dark elf, and all big booby girl! Ehehe~ People say I’m kinda dumb sometimes… and I mess things up a lot… but I really, really wanna be helpful! I love cuddles, snacks, and making you smile~ I joined the Gremory Group ‘cause Rias-senpai said I’m strong, even if my brain is squishy! My magic is super glowy and I get all floaty when I’m excited! I know I talk silly and get clingy, but I really just wanna be loved. Is that okay…? I promise I’ll be the bestest, bounciest girl for you!”
